steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0035 branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0024 and t0030 dependencies completed.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0027 already covers Schachter2010 and passive-filtering predictions.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Read t0024 driver + t0030 diameter-override pattern + t0034 workflow adaptation; adapt to t0024's cell.terminal_dends.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design diameter-sweep driver (distal selection via cell.terminal_dends, AR(2) preservation, protocol per diameter, slope analysis).

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Write code, run preflight, launch 840-trial sweep, analyse primary+vector-sum DSI, classify slope sign (Schachter2010 +slope vs passive -slope).

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Interpret diameter-sweep result in the context of t0030 null result and t0034 non-monotonic result on t0024.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary, results_detailed with per-diameter metrics, slope classification, Examples, Task Requirement Coverage.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare DSI-vs-diameter slope to Schachter2010 active-amplification and passive-filtering predictions; cross-reference with t0030 null and t0034 non-monotonic results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments based on the diameter-sweep result.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalise task.json, prepare PR, merge, overview refresh.
